title: Globularia × indubia
taxonomy: Globularia × indubia is a hybrid species of the genus Globularia, which is a group of flowering plants in the family Plantaginaceae. The parent species of Globularia × indubia are Globularia alypum and Globularia trichotoma, and the exact classification can vary based on the source and taxonomic system used. However, it is generally considered to be a part of the section Globularia within the genus Globularia. This classification is based on the plant's morphology, including its leaves and flowers, as well as its genetic makeup. Further research and updates may be necessary to provide a more detailed or definitive classification.
